meta.title: The best BVR missile in the world! Europe's METEOR
meta.description:
The Meteor Missile, developed in a joint effort from the UK, France, Sweden, Germany, Italy, and Spain, uses a solid fuel, variable flow ducted rocket — or ramjet — for propulsion. And that makes it incredible dangerous for beyond-visual-range engagements. 

#shorts #short #airpower #missile #meteormissile #airtoair #aviation #defense #tech #technology
